title: mimulus nepalensis var. japonicus
intro: Mimulus nepalensis var. japonicus, also known as Japanese monkey flower, is a plant species belonging to the family Phrymaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are thought to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing digestive issues. Mimulus nepalensis var. japonicus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed for their medicinal properties.
